overview: Tru Functional Health offers personalized, holistic wellness plans using integrative therapies and coaching to address root causes of health challenges. The clinic provides advanced alternative treatments including hyperbaric oxygen therapy, IV infusions, ozone therapy, and other modalities designed to reduce pain and support overall wellness.
highlights: IV vitamin infusions and wellness coaching
targetAudience: People managing chronic pain, fatigue, inflammation, and various health conditions seeking alternative, root-cause-focused treatment approaches.
